title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 130.096 - Severability
text:
130.096.  Severability. — If any provision of this chapter or the application thereof to any person or circumstance is held invalid, the invalidity shall not affect other provisions or application of this chapter which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this chapter are declared severable.
(L. 1978 S.B. 839)
